phrases.summary: The text states that Azor is the parent who begot (gave birth to) Sadoc.
The text states that Sadoc is the parent who begot (gave birth to) Achim.
The text states that Achim is the parent who begot (gave birth to) Eliud.

phrases.phrase: Ἀζὼρ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Σαδώκ, Σαδὼκ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Ἀχίμ, Ἀχὶμ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Ἐλιούδ,
phrases.translation: And Azor begot Sadoc, Sadoc begot Achim, and Achim begot Eliud.
phrases.summary: Taken together, the text presents a sequence of genealogical parent-child relationships, describing Azor → Sadoc → Achim → Eliud as successive generations.
